meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding to Accelerate AI App Development
content.seo_description: Stop slow development cycles. Learn to engineer high-conversion user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code in this advanced student tutorial.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed often stems from feature bloat and poor user guidance. By implementing an automated, modular onboarding flow, you eliminate friction, increase user retention, and allow your core features to shine. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation to slash your time-to-market by 40%.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, a cursor blinks in the void, and your feature backlog grows like a wildfire you can't contain. Every hour spent manually wiring onboarding flows is an hour stolen from the high-impact logic that makes your AI product unique. You are stuck in the 'development trap'—where the complexity of your own architecture is slowing your velocity to a crawl.

But the best engineers don't work harder; they build systems that work for them. By treating your onboarding as a modular, automated asset rather than an afterthought, you reclaim your focus. This tutorial transforms your development process from a manual grind into a streamlined pipeline using the latest in AI-assisted engineering.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define the user journey as a finite state machine to decouple UI from business logic, preventing spaghetti code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state machine schema for a multi-step SaaS onboarding flow including 'welcome', 'profile_setup', 'feature_tour', and 'activation'. Use TypeScript types.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the state machine architecture defined by Antigravity in src/lib/onboarding-flow.ts'

steps.title: Automating Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to generate consistent, accessible onboarding components that match your design system perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular React onboarding component library with Framer Motion transitions for slide-over modals.

steps.title: Implementing Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure onboarding progress is saved asynchronously so users can resume without frustration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase hook to track onboarding completion status per user ID, ensuring atomic updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Connect the onboarding state machine to the Supabase client for persistence'

steps.title: Integrating AI-Driven Personalization
steps.description: Use LLMs to dynamically adjust the onboarding path based on user input, increasing relevance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility function that uses an LLM to categorize user goals from a text input and returns an onboarding path configuration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add dynamic path selection logic to the onboarding controller using the new LLM utility'

steps.title: Optimizing for Performance and Telemetry
steps.description: Add event tracking to identify exactly where users drop off in your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement PostHog tracking events for every step transition in the onboarding flow including custom properties.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Instrument the onboarding flow with PostHog analytics'

pro_tips: Always use 'Atomic Design' for onboarding components to ensure they can be reused in your main app dashboard later.
Implement a 'Skip' button that triggers a background process to pre-fill defaults; never trap a user in a mandatory tutorial.
Use mock data factories during development to test edge cases in your onboarding flow without manual database entry.
Leverage the 'Ghost Mode' pattern: let users interact with a simulated version of your app before they even sign up.
Monitor 'Time-to-First-Value' (TTFV) as your primary metric; if your onboarding takes longer than 2 minutes, you are losing users.
content.next_steps: After completing this, deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and use a tool like Hotjar to record user sessions, then refine your flow based on real behavior.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop building manual flows and start shipping intelligent user experiences. Don't let your code velocity dictate your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
